title: Finite Active-Set Quadratic Program Checks

solver_reuse.target: finite active-set QP bad free-gradient QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Exact active-set replay computes free-coordinate stationarity error 2 for the malformed active-face candidate.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional active-set rows only when they add distinct degenerate active sets, working-set pivots, equality-constrained solves, cycling guards, or convergence pressure; keep general active-set method theory in horizon lanes.

graduation_criteria: Encode finite active-set QP witnesses as deterministic exact-rational replay rows.
Replay unconstrained minimizers, active-face candidates, constraint slacks, KKT multipliers, stationarity residuals, and free-coordinate errors over exact rationals.
Route false active-set candidate claims through checked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence after replay computes the stationarity error.
Keep general active-set finite termination, cycling, degeneracy, and convergence claims marked Lean-horizon until proof artifacts exist.
